title: lastrea hattorii
intro: Lastrea hattorii, also known as the Hattori's fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lastrea hattorii are believed to include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and improving respiratory issues, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used in teas, infusions, or as a dried powder to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
